rule_id.description: Unique across all rule files. Snake_case.

product.description: Product code(s) this rule applies to, or '*' for every product.

priority.description: Lower number = higher precedence when two matching rules include the same template_id with conflicting overrides. Exclusions always win regardless of priority.

effective_from.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Rule is ignored before this date.

effective_to.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Rule is ignored after this date.

exclude_documents.description: template_ids to remove from the resolved set, even if another matching rule included them.

set_variables.description: Merged into every resolved document's variables for this evaluation (e.g. {'language': 'de'}).
